tree.setup: Teacher Li's small office, lined with bookshelves and a collection of tea cans from every province she's visited. She's the kind of teacher who remembers which characters each student struggles with. Right now she's grading papers with a red pen that she holds like a calligraphy brush.
tree.setup_zh: 李老师的小办公室，书架上摆满了她去过的每个省的茶叶罐。她是那种记得每个学生不会写哪个字的老师。现在她用红笔批作业，握笔像拿毛笔一样。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 请进！有什么问题想问吗？
turns.text_pinyin: qǐng jìn! yǒu shénme wèntí xiǎng wèn ma?
turns.text_en: Come in! Do you have any questions?

options.text_zh: 李老师，我有一个语法问题。「了」和「过」有什么不同？
options.text_pinyin: lǐ lǎoshī, wǒ yǒu yí gè yǔfǎ wèntí.「le」hé「guo」yǒu shénme bùtóng?
options.text_en: Teacher Li, I have a grammar question. What's the difference between 了 and 过?
options.feedback: Teacher Li sets down her red pen and lights up -- this is her favorite topic.「好问题！了是说事情发生了，过是说你有这个经历。」有什么不同 is 'what's the difference' -- a learner's best friend.

options.text_zh: 老师，我的作业做得对不对？
options.text_pinyin: lǎoshī, wǒ de zuòyè zuò de duì bu duì?
options.text_en: Teacher, did I do my homework correctly?
options.feedback: Teacher Li flips to your paper.「大部分都对。这个地方有一个小错误……」She circles it gently. 对不对 asks 'right or not right.'

options.text_pinyin: zhè ge kǎoshì nán bu nán?
options.feedback: Teacher Li smiles mysteriously.「如果你准备好了就不难。」She will neither confirm nor deny the difficulty level. She is a professional. 难不难 uses the A不A question form.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你的中文进步很快。继续这样学下去！
turns.text_pinyin: nǐ de zhōngwén jìnbù hěn kuài. jìxù zhèyàng xué xiàqù!
turns.text_en: Your Chinese is improving quickly. Keep studying like this!

options.text_pinyin: xièxie lǎoshī! nín jiāo de hěn hǎo.
options.text_en: Thank you, teacher! You teach very well.
options.feedback: Teacher Li waves the compliment away modestly, but reaches for her best tea.「喝一杯？」When a Chinese teacher offers tea, you've earned real respect.

options.text_pinyin: wǒ juéde hái bú gòu hǎo.
options.text_en: I don't think I'm good enough yet.
options.feedback: Teacher Li nods approvingly.「这种态度很好。但是你真的进步了。」She respects humility. 还不够 means 'still not enough.'

options.text_pinyin: xué zhōngwén bǐ wǒ xiǎng de nán.
options.text_en: Learning Chinese is harder than I thought.
options.feedback: Teacher Li pours you tea without asking.「每个人都这么说。但是你已经能跟我说话了，对不对？」比 is 'compared to' -- the comparison pattern.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 有问题随时来找我。门一直开着。
turns.text_pinyin: yǒu wèntí suíshí lái zhǎo wǒ. mén yìzhí kāizhe.
turns.text_en: Come find me anytime you have questions. The door is always open.

tree.cultural_note: Chinese teachers are addressed as 老师 (lǎoshī) and treated with significant respect. Office hours (答疑时间, dáyí shíjiān) are common. Offering tea to a student is a sign of warmth and mentorship.
